languages.original_text: "Someone is bound to ask sooner or later, so it might as well be me. Purely out of curiosity... is a Rogue Trader still a Rogue Trader if they don't have a Warrant?"

languages.text: "Полагаю, кто-то рано или поздно это спросит, так что пусть это буду я. Из чистого любопытства... является ли Вольный Торговец Вольным Торговцем, если у него нет Патента?"
"Someone is bound to ask sooner or later, so it might as well be me. Purely out of curiosity... is a Rogue Trader still a Rogue Trader if they don't have a Warrant?"

"Someone is bound to ask sooner or later, so it might as well be me. Purely out of curiosity... is a Rogue Trader still a Rogue Trader if they don't have a Warrant?"
"Someone is bound to ask sooner or later, so it might as well be me. Purely out of curiosity... is a Rogue Trader still a Rogue Trader if they don't have a Warrant?"

languages.text: 「いつかは誰かが必ず聞くだろうから、私が聞くのもいいだろう。純粋に好奇心で…ウォーレントがないなら、ローグトレーダーはローグトレーダーではないのか？」
languages.original_text: "Someone is bound to ask sooner or later, so it might as well be me. Purely out of curiosity... is a Rogue Trader still a Rogue Trader if they don't have a Warrant?"

traits.locale_text: 「いつかは誰かが必ず聞くだろうから、私が聞くのもいいだろう。純粋に好奇心で…ウォーレントがないなら、ローグトレーダーはローグトレーダーではないのか？」

languages.text: « Quelqu'un finira par poser la question tôt ou tard, alors autant que ce soit moi. Par simple curiosité... un libre-marchand conserve-t-il son statut s'il n'a plus sa lettre de marque ? »
languages.original_text: "Someone is bound to ask sooner or later, so it might as well be me. Purely out of curiosity... is a Rogue Trader still a Rogue Trader if they don't have a Warrant?"

traits.locale_text: « Quelqu'un finira par poser la question tôt ou tard, alors autant que ce soit moi. Par simple curiosité... un libre-marchand conserve-t-il son statut s'il n'a plus sa lettre de marque ? »

languages.text: "Früher oder später wird das ohnehin jemand fragen, also kann es auch ich tun. Nur so aus Neugier ... ist {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin} ohne Handelsbrief eigentlich noch {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin}?"
languages.original_text: "Someone is bound to ask sooner or later, so it might as well be me. Purely out of curiosity... is a Rogue Trader still a Rogue Trader if they don't have a Warrant?"

traits.locale_text: "Früher oder später wird das ohnehin jemand fragen, also kann es auch ich tun. Nur so aus Neugier ... ist {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin} ohne Handelsbrief eigentlich noch {mf|ein Freihändler|eine Freihändlerin}?"

languages.text: "Er ya da geç biri soracak, o yüzden ben sorayım. Sırf meraktan... Bir Hür Tacir, Ruhsatname olmazsa hâlâ Hür Tacir olur mu?"
languages.original_text: "Someone is bound to ask sooner or later, so it might as well be me. Purely out of curiosity... is a Rogue Trader still a Rogue Trader if they don't have a Warrant?"

traits.locale_text: "Er ya da geç biri soracak, o yüzden ben sorayım. Sırf meraktan... Bir Hür Tacir, Ruhsatname olmazsa hâlâ Hür Tacir olur mu?"

languages.text: «Alguien lo va a preguntar tarde o temprano, así que voy a ahorrar tiempo. Por pura curiosidad... ¿un Comerciante Independiente sigue siendo Comerciante Independiente si se queda sin la Patente?».
languages.original_text: "Someone is bound to ask sooner or later, so it might as well be me. Purely out of curiosity... is a Rogue Trader still a Rogue Trader if they don't have a Warrant?"

traits.locale_text: «Alguien lo va a preguntar tarde o temprano, así que voy a ahorrar tiempo. Por pura curiosidad... ¿un Comerciante Independiente sigue siendo Comerciante Independiente si se queda sin la Patente?».

languages.text: “反正迟早会有人问出口，不如就让我来吧。只是单纯出于好奇……行商浪人要是没了贸易授状，还算不算行商浪人？”
languages.original_text: "Someone is bound to ask sooner or later, so it might as well be me. Purely out of curiosity... is a Rogue Trader still a Rogue Trader if they don't have a Warrant?"
